⎿  $ go build ./...
⎿  output line x
⎿  output line xx
⎿  output line xxx
⎿  output line xxxx
⎿  output line xxxxx
⎿  output line xxxxxx
⎿  output line xxxxxxx
⎿  output line xxxxxxxx
⎿  output line xxxxxxxxx
⎿  output line xxxxxxxxxx
⎿  +15 more lines (ctrl+o to expand)

⎿  $ echo hello world
⎿  hello world
